meaning: n.承认,确认,竧 of receipt//回执行
examples: The flowers were a small acknowledgement of your kindness.
This report is an acknowledgement of the size of the problem.
We need an acknowledgement of our present ecological plight but also a language of positive change, visions of a better future.
The acknowledgement of diversity as an economic imperative is central to sustainable capitalism and investing.
He was forced to remove the image from the spot, a tacit acknowledgement of a misstep.
